html: In the document, the government outlines the military support that Sweden has provided to Ukraine since Russia's full-scale invasion in 2022. The document also includes explanations of how the military support is coordinated in an international context, how it is monitored, and how lessons learned from the war in Ukraine are being incorporated. Furthermore, the government provides its assessment of the effects of the Swedish support.
tldr: The government has published a report detailing how Sweden has assisted Ukraine with weapons and military equipment since Russia initiated its war in 2022. The report outlines the actions taken by Sweden and how cooperation with other countries functions.
lattlast:
The government has compiled a report on the military support provided to Ukraine. It details everything that Sweden has sent to help the country since Russia's military intervention at the beginning of 2022.

The report also describes how Sweden is cooperating with other countries to coordinate the assistance. It is important for countries to work together so that the support is as effective as possible for Ukraine.

The government has also examined how the assistance has worked in practice. They have investigated the results of the Swedish support and are trying to learn from what is happening in the war in order to make the right decisions in the future.
